programme.title: This World Is Filled With Wants 5Min.
Exquisite Railway Gourmet Trip: Kyushu
programme.desc: Actor colleagues Tokiwa Takako and Ishida Hikari take a one‑night, two‑day rail journey across Kyushu aboard the luxury sightseeing train “Sanju-Roku plus San ,” the Sonic limited express, and the restaurant train “THE RAIL KITCHEN CHIKUGO.” Along the way, they enjoy beautiful views and distinctive onboard cuisine, discovering the region through its food on a journey filled with flavor and charm.

programme.title: A Rainy Day
programme.desc: Wrench involves the Buffycats in his 'Scrapyard Game', an outdoor activity calling the four cat friends to imagine themselves in fantasy scenarios and solve adventurous missions... all avoiding the heavy rain pouring outside!

programme.title: Ebb and the New Boat
programme.desc: A new boat arrives and Bird makes a new friend Zoot, a tiny yellow canary who lives on the boat. They become inseparable. Grrrr. Then, one day, the new boat is gone along with Zoot. Bird pines. Ebb and Flo create a little gift to cheer Bird up.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Signature Painting
programme.desc: Make your name disappear in a game of colored shapes.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Sheepdog
programme.desc: Henry meets a Border Collie sheep dog and learns what a sheep dog does and why shepherds use them.

programme.title: Communicating without Wires
programme.desc: How come we can't hear people talking next to us when we're in the sea? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of sound. Have hands-on fun by making a basic phone, and get to know Guglielmo Marconi, a physicist and inventor – ‘the father of radio'.

programme.title: Functions
programme.desc: Instead of writing and re-writing the same lines of codes several times, there is a way in which you can write thousands of lines of code once. Find out more about functions and how you can use this method.

programme.title: The Bare Bird Bath
programme.desc: Kea's bird bath keeps running out of water, and after investigating the problem, Darwin and Newts discover that it's evaporating in the sun.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Trip to Serbia
programme.desc: Milo is thrilled to find a four-leaf clover and shows it to Alim, who eats it! Upset, Zoe and Milo follow Alim to Serbia, where Nevana invites them to a party with sports. They learn that Serbia has other lucky charms beyond the four-leaf clover.

programme.title: Catchy Tune
programme.desc: Motor creates the catchiest tune ever-everyone's hooked, from Jessi to the whole world... except Flippy. As the tune turns into a global obsession of endless humming and dancing, Motor must uncover why Flippy is immune-and if he can help save the world.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Shrinking Rink
programme.desc: Addison's plans for a local version of the winter Olympics are in jeopardy unless she can figure out why their outdoor ice skating rink keeps mysteriously melting and running away.

programme.title: Metal Cap
programme.desc: The best news is that Hepi and Briko have figured out some exciting DIYs with metal caps!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Grownups
programme.desc: When Yoko misunderstands the definition of the word ‘grownup', the kids get caught in a bureaucratic loop with Yoko as a crazy boss!

programme.title: Trip to Bhutan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo wish each other a happy New Year when Alim arrives and wishes them a happy birthday. Confused, they follow him to Bhutan, where their friend Dorji explains that in this Himalayan country, everyone turns a year older on New Year's Day.

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: Ebb Keeps it Safe
programme.desc: After a game of beach frisbee, Ebb will be Frisbee Guard. When a gull tries to steal it, Bird stops him. Ebb buries the frisbee in the sand for safety but then loses it. The incoming tide reveals that Ebb kept it safe after all. Things Couldn't Be...

programme.title: Swan Dancing with the Stars
programme.desc: Headmistress Cinderella hosts a dance competition at her castle. Astoria and Odette, the Swan Princess's granddaughter, are determined to win. Vicky, with Rothbart's help, sabotages the dance. Rose must help everyone dance to victory despite the sabotage.

programme.title: Myths and Legends
programme.desc: After taking care of his daily chores, Howler ‘gets away from it all' by daydreaming about wonderful encounters! In the process, he takes us through various contemporary beliefs, myths and legends, powered by his very rich imagination.

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: The Defence of the Bombardier Beetle
programme.desc: The bombardier beetle has evolved a special way to avoid being eaten. It mixes two chemicals together in its tummy which then explode out as a mixture of a protective chemical and boiling water. It has to be careful not to burn itself!

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Giang Brothers: Renowned Circus Performers
programme.desc: The Giang brothers demonstrate how they used their incredible circus skills to achieve a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest blindfolded ascent and descent of an elevated platform while balancing on each other's head.

programme.title: Glitch
programme.desc: A spill in the garage causes a malfunction in Jesse's teleportation abilities. Julia and Ian must beat a game in one sitting.

programme.title: Anything Could Happen
programme.desc: A surprising new partnership is announced when coach Nikki decides to pair up Dylan and Nyree. Finn, Kirsten, and Dove have all made life-changing decisions, and Amelie and Phoebe head off to Lillishall for an exclusive Olympic training camp.

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush.

E2 - Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E3 - Ahoy Captain Pak Choi
programme.desc: Supertato and Broccoli go on a pirate adventure with Captain Pak Choi, but they don't realise she intends on plundering Evil Pea's freezer and stealing all her shiny things.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E33 - Go Jet Academy: Geo Challenge
programme.desc: The Go Jetters test their knowledge and teamwork in a tricky maze full of trials. But can they escape the labyrinth, beat Glitch's high score and still keep the team together?

programme.title: E2 - Hospital
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E39 - Wimbledon, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are at Centre Court in Wimbledon to watch the world's most famous tennis tournament.

programme.title: E1 - Emily's Best Friend
programme.desc: Emily worries that she doesn't have a best friend. Soon she realises she's been surrounded by best friends all along.

programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E39 - Wimbledon, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are at Centre Court in Wimbledon to watch the world's most famous tennis tournament.

programme.title: E1 - Emily's Best Friend
programme.desc: Emily worries that she doesn't have a best friend. Soon she realises she's been surrounded by best friends all along.

programme.title: E28 - Wool On Wheels
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: E41 - Power
programme.desc: Stanley needs to do some jobs for the community, but all his vehicles are out of power due to a cloud of butterflies obscuring them and he needs to figure out how to move them.

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E2 - Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E3 - Ahoy Captain Pak Choi
programme.desc: Supertato and Broccoli go on a pirate adventure with Captain Pak Choi, but they don't realise she intends on plundering Evil Pea's freezer and stealing all her shiny things.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'tractor' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see all sorts of tractors - a blue tractor, a pulling tractor, a stuck in the mud tractor and an on a farm tractor.

programme.desc: Messy travels back to the start of the universe to find out where everything came from.

programme.title: E4 - Box Headed Burglar
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more!

programme.title: E8 - Deadly Web Of Lies
programme.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programme.title: E4 - Box Headed Burglar

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E5 - De Hoop: Place of Hope
programme.desc: This small park makes a big difference to endangered animals. Offering sanctuary to some of the biggest and smallest animals on the planet, witness how species come back from the edge of extinction to reclaim their place in Africa’s wilderness.

programme.title: E1 - The Littlest Cub
programme.desc: Get to know Winston, a tiny abandoned cub who imprints on Judy as she nurses him 24-7. Feel the heartbreak as she severs their emotional attachment and teaches this sweet little fellow how to be a grown-up, independent bear in the non-human world.

programme.title: E5 - De Hoop: Place of Hope
programme.desc: This small park makes a big difference to endangered animals. Offering sanctuary to some of the biggest and smallest animals on the planet, witness how species come back from the edge of extinction to reclaim their place in Africa’s wilderness.

programme.title: E4 - Coral Seas
programme.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.title: E1 - The Little Penguin
programme.desc: Follow the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of little penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighborhoods in nature. Theirs is a family saga of faithful relationships, committed homemaking, and vigorous nightlife.

programme.desc: This small park makes a big difference to endangered animals. Offering sanctuary to some of the biggest and smallest animals on the planet, witness how species come back from the edge of extinction to reclaim their place in Africa’s wilderness.

programme.title: E4 - Coral Seas
programme.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.title: E1 - The Little Penguin
programme.desc: Follow the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of little penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighborhoods in nature. Theirs is a family saga of faithful relationships, committed homemaking, and vigorous nightlife.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E7 - Samantha's Bad Day in Salem
programme.desc: Samantha runs into an old flame whose affection for her gives Darrin something to 'crow' about.

programme.title: E8 - Part 8
programme.desc: In 1824, Kizzy learns the ultimate fate of her parents. Meanwhile, Mingo teaches Kizzy's son George how to become a cockfighting trainer. This eventually leads to huge unexpected changes in George's status.

programme.title: E17 - Pursuit
programme.desc: When Alicia begins to receive personal threats, her life-long pursuit to find her sister’s abductor emerges. Benson and Fin are joined in the investigation by ADA Sonya Paxton, who may be too involved in the case.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E721 - Flying Robot Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher's robot sends Crusher and Pickle far-far away, it's up to Robot Blaze and Robot Sparkle to rescue them using coding!

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E107 - Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: E814 - Children's Festival
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is lots of singing, dancing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: E410 - Robots In Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting

programme.title: E103 - Boris
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris?

programme.title: E216 - Pirate Island
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig are taking Peppa, George and their friends to Pirate Island. Grandpa shows how to use his metal detector to find treasures and they all build a big sandcastle.

programme.title: E12 - Something I Ate
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: E13 - Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: E11 - The Wrong Address
programme.desc: During a seemingly normal delivery, Chowder's gut instincts lead him and Mung on a non-stop adventure.

programme.title: E13 - Burple Nurples
programme.desc: When Chowder unknowingly fills a dish with poison, Mung must spend the day keeping the tainted food away from the citizens of Marzipan City.

programme.title: E11 - Am I Blue?
programme.desc: Philly Phil's latest invention turns the kids blue.

programme.title: Gambling Queen
programme.desc: Nan, a gambling goddess from Mainland China who is smart and has extraordinary martial arts skills. She comes to Hong Kong alone to find her cousin Bao who lives there. Her target: a crooked investor and card shark extraordinaire. When Nan's underhanded opponent proves too much to handle on her own, she enlists the aid of some rather unusual helpers, including an overconfident casino playboy, a disastrously awkward stuntman, and a perky martial arts princess. Pooling their various talents, Nan concocts a crazy scheme to take down her adversary that is destined to go down in gambling history.

programme.title: The Last Blood
programme.desc: Tarka Lama, a famous leader of religion in Asia and also a Chinese leader-in-exile, visits Singapore with his disciple/escort for a special mission. No sooner have they arrived the airport, Lama is assassinated in the welcoming ceremony...

programme.title: The Other Side Of Gentleman
programme.desc: A group of intellectuals, who all actively involved in a psychological research, assume a subject Fai, who is innocent and aimless in his life, to test if love can make him into a different person. Jo Jo is the chosen girl to carry out the mission, who attracts Fai with her elegance and beauty. At the same time, she finds herself attracted by him. She wants Professor Cheung, her boyfriend, to stop such a cruel test, but she fails. The final commitment comes when Jo Jo marries to Cheung. Fai interrupts the wedding ceremony in the church by announcing his love to Jo Jo...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: It's A Mad Mad Mad World
programme.desc: News reporter Bill and his wife live in a public housing flat with their 3 daughters. Their dream is to get rich someday. When Lady Luck comes knocking on their door one day and they win the first prize of the local lottery, Mark Six, all hell break loose...

programme.title: The Other Side Of Gentleman
programme.desc: A group of intellectuals, who all actively involved in a psychological research, assume a subject Fai, who is innocent and aimless in his life, to test if love can make him into a different person. Jo Jo is the chosen girl to carry out the mission, who attracts Fai with her elegance and beauty. At the same time, she finds herself attracted by him. She wants Professor Cheung, her boyfriend, to stop such a cruel test, but she fails. The final commitment comes when Jo Jo marries to Cheung. Fai interrupts the wedding ceremony in the church by announcing his love to Jo Jo...

programme.title: Never Ending Summer
programme.desc: Chan Tai Yuen had planned to migrate to Canada, he found out that his wife was having an affair with a foreigner. Chan had already transferred the ownership of the house and the car to his wife. Suddenly Chan lost everything. Chan met Ng Sam Kwi, Chan had nowhere to go and thus moved into Ng's house. They gradually fell in love with each other. Would Ng change herself for her love?

programme.title: E47 - In Autun (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Autun, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the town's armoury and in the region's sheep.

programme.title: E12 - Photographers From The End Of The World
programme.desc: A hundred years ago, Jacques de Thezac photographed the Bigouden region. Today, Stephane Lavoue follows in his footsteps and captures the landscapes and faces of this rugged Breton territory, thus documenting its evolution over time.

programme.title: E47 - In Autun (2)

programme.desc: Loic Ballet follows the trail of the Marquis de La Fayette and meets specialists of this famous historical figure.

programme.title: E1 - The Flying Brothers
programme.desc: At the controls of an electric ULM they built themselves, Laurent and Thierry Guignard decide to pay tribute to their old uncle Donat, a pioneer of aviation in Romandy. A delicious re-run of his heroic crossing of Lake Geneva in 1938...

programme.title: E32 - Transport/Monkfish/Wave-Ski/Beef Steak
programme.desc: In the summary: the history of public transport in the Basque Country; roast monkfish recipe; discovering wave-skiing; beef steak tataki-style recipe.

programme.desc: The noontime daily newscast that delivers the hottest news and happenings in the country.

programme.title: Idol Sa Kusina
programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Return To Paradise
programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E18 - Cantal, On The Shoulder Of A Giant
programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: E18 - The Super Soldiers
programme.desc: N'zi and Lucio arrive in the Bali priestesses' camp. Meanwhile, the Komians from Kumassi confront Ebri Morrow's soldiers who are trying to break through the protective dome.

programme.title: E1808
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Meurtres A Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. And it is his daughter, Marion, who heads the case, alongside Antoine. What links the murders? Suspicions begin to grow about the way the first case was handled.

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E4 - A New Home For Lison
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E32 - The Ballpoint Pen
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Laissez-Vous Guider S1
programme.desc: Stephane Bern and Lorant Deutsch let their love of history and heritage do the talking. Anecdotes, revelations, little known stories, architecture... Let yourself be guide

E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

E18
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.desc: Super Eruption is a non-stop thrill ride - the story of two people who come together to put a stop to one of the greatest natural disasters to ever threaten humanity.

programme.desc: A car robbery and Santa Claus bandit captivate headlines, and the crime goes unsolved for years until a local man is found buried in the snow.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Fiery First Experience of Voice Acting
programme.desc: New title of the Crayon Shinchan movie series, “Crayon Shinchan the Movie: Super-Hot! The Spicy Kasukabe Dancers”, has been released. For Hong Kong's Cantonese-dubbed version, singer Cloud Wan Ho Ying and new generation idol Phoebus Ng Kai Yeung have been invited to voice over two new characters. In this episode, Cloud and Phoebus will share the anecdotes from their dubbing experience; Phoebus will demonstrate some voice over techniques, and more behind-the-scene stories are to be told.

programme.title: Election
programme.desc: The time has come, as it does every two years, for the senior members of Hong Kong's oldest Triad, The Wo Shing Society, to elect a new chairman. Fierce rivalries emerge between the two eligible candidates. Lok, respected by the Uncles is the favorite to win. But his rival Big D will stop at nothing to change this, including going against hundreds of years of Triad tradition and influencing the vote with money and violence.

programme.title: Pretty Heart
programme.desc: Mr. K.K. Ho, is a leading “star tutor” with remarkable achievements. Lee Lung Kei , the stingy boss and principal of the cram school, regards Mr. Ho as a trump card. Chloe, a traditional high school teacher, has always tried her best in teaching. Chloe despises K.K.'s teaching methods and refers to them as deviant. The two of them give tit for tat in class. Their conflict leads to K.K.'s appreciation for Chloe. He gives her flowers as an apology, but Chloe never accepts. He finds out Chloe is the daughter of Principal Lee. When she was young, she witnessed her mother being bullied and died by accident. That is why she deeply hates her father and refuses to get in touch with him. K.K. with wisdom and courage, who breaks through all the obstacles to pursue Chloe but also takes into account the father-daughter relationship. However, he learns Chloe has genetic heart disease and what's worse, due to her diligent teaching for years, the doctor believes that she could only live for

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E14

programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.desc: Discover how modern technology has transformed the way traditional Indian flatbread is baked; crunchy cheesy puffs get a flavour as bright as their neon colour; cream filled cookies get that distinctly Canadian taste and shape; and decadent chocolates are filled.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory: Connecting With the Country
programme.desc: Sara goes to Kakadu in the Northern Territory to learn about the Indigenous traditions of the area, including the wild herbs they use in their cooking.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E2 - 小狗城市運動指南
programme.desc: 以寵物為主角，萌寵們在「鏟屎官」的帶領下，前往上海、大理、深圳三座城市，從城市到田園，從森林到海邊，讓觀眾看到人寵相伴的多樣出行方式，了解到流浪動物的救助計劃，以及探索人與寵物的和諧相處的新方法。

programme.title: E2 - 小狗城市運動指南

programme.title: Downsizing
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, a couple decides to ditch their stressed out lives and downsize to live large in a luxurious community.

programme.title: E13 - Tunneling To Freedom
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: E23 - The Hunt For Hitler
programme.desc: The history books say Adolf Hitler committed suicide in the final days of World War II, but not everyone believes there's sufficient proof. Did the Nazi leader die in Berlin, or was he able to escape?

programme.title: E256 - Resurrecting Puma Punku
programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle-and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth?

programme.title: E15 - Dark And Dangerous
programme.desc: The clock is ticking with only days remaining in python season. Pickle seeks validation from Troy on her tracking skills. Bruce must hunt alone in Zak's absence.
